---
title: "Felix Odenthal"
subtitle: "Mechanistic interpretability research notes"
---

I'm an undergraduate at UChicago working on mechanistic interpretability.

## Current Work

Placeholder for current research projects and active questions.

See the [Research](research.qmd) page for project templates and current directions.

## Research Notes

Placeholder for informal notes, working drafts, and future writeups.

See the [Notes](notes.qmd) page for draft notes.

## Contact

[email/contact link here]
